ksa_text: Conduct and document privacy awareness training programs and communications for organizational staff at all levels.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Appropriate methods and metrics are identified and applied.

top_anchors.element_label: Appropriate methods and metrics are identified and applied.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-002 (SP, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4083 is insufficient to establish relevance to health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.408, nist_ai_rmf=0.395, eu_ai_act=0.390) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4083 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-T-002 (composite 0.4083) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.4083 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.4083 is not a standard requirement for Health Informatics Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4083, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
